mapper.sql: r.id, r.reporter_id, r.target_type, r.target_id, r.reason_type, r.reason_detail, r.status, r.handled_by, r.handled_at, r.created_at, ru.username AS reporter_username, hu.username AS handled_by_username
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM reports r INNER JOIN users ru ON ru.id = r.reporter_id LEFT JOIN users hu ON hu.id = r.handled_by WHERE r.id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE reports SET status = #{status}, handled_by = #{handledBy}, handled_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE reports SET status = 'RESOLVED', handled_by = #{handledBy}, handled_at = NOW() WHERE target_type = #{targetType} AND target_id = #{targetId} AND status IN ('PENDING', 'PROCESSING')
